name: competitive-ads-extractor
tagline: Scrapes and analyzes competitor ad-library creative and messaging to inform your own ad campaigns.
verdict: Legitimate research workflow, no security concerns found. Weak on execution rigor: no scraping method or tool declared, no handling for blocked/empty scrapes, no rerun dedup, and no versioning signal — reliability risk more than safety risk.

highlights.summary: Description states what it extracts/analyzes but has no explicit 'use when' trigger phrasing.
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the skill.
'Scrapes ads from Facebook Ad Library, LinkedIn, etc.' gives no method, tool, or auth approach for actually doing this.
